name: power-stage
source: official SIMPLIS examples inspected with scripts/inspect_schematic.py

power_switch.validation: verify the selected switch symbol and all pins in the configured installed .sxslb libraries before placement

body_diode.validation: verify diode symbol pins in the configured installed .sxslb libraries before placement

inductor.validation: verify inductor symbol pins in the configured installed .sxslb libraries before placement

capacitor.validation: verify capacitor symbol pins in the configured installed .sxslb libraries before placement

resistor.validation: verify resistor symbol pins in the configured installed .sxslb libraries before placement

voltage_source.validation: verify voltage source pins in the configured installed .sxslb libraries before placement

current_source.validation: verify current source pins in the configured installed .sxslb libraries before placement

ground.validation: use a ground symbol for net 0 and verify the selected symbol exists

net_terminal.validation: use VALUE as the electrical net label and verify the terminal symbol exists
